goals: Explore what memories are currently stored in the system
Add important information about client preferences and work context
Search for specific stored information to verify it was saved correctly
Clean up outdated or irrelevant memories

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and relationship-focused. Prefers actionable insights over technical details. Asks clarifying questions when exploring new tools.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced professional who understands business workflows and client management but is not familiar with memory APIs or technical implementation details. Learns by doing.

end_condition: The user has successfully explored the memory system, added relevant information, verified storage, and cleaned up as needed.
